concerns.text: FR-004 (10,000 iterations) and SC-003 (time budget) lack a completed task. T028a is marked [ ] (incomplete) and is the sole task responsible for the simulation loop orchestration. Without this task, the core experimental data required for FR-005, FR-006, and SC-001/002/004/005 cannot be generated.

FR-005 (calculate Type I error and Power) and SC-001/002/004/005 lack a completed task. T029 is marked [ ] (incomplete). It depends on T028c, which in turn depends on the incomplete T028a. No alternative task covers the aggregation logic.

FR-009 (compare synthetic vs real-world) and SC-006 lack a completed task. T039 is marked [ ] (incomplete). It requires T038 (real-world results) and T029 (synthetic results), both of which are blocked by incomplete upstream tasks.

FR-010 (mixed-effects models) and SC-007 lack a completed task. T053 is marked [ ] (incomplete). It requires T028c (synthetic results) and T056 (real-world data). While T056 is complete, the synthetic data generation (T028a) is missing, making the fixed-effect analysis impossible.

Assumption about threshold justification (sensitivity analysis) lacks a completed task. T057 is marked [ ] (incomplete). This task is explicitly required to validate the assumption that findings are not artifacts of the alpha=0.05 cutoff.

Assumption about statistical tests (numerical stability) lacks a completed task. T058 is marked [ ] (incomplete). This task is required to verify that scaling does not introduce numerical instability beyond floating-point tolerance.

FR-008 (ingest 10 datasets) and SC-006 (real-world validation) have a gap in task coverage for the full metadata enrichment. T059 is marked [ ] (incomplete). While T056 ingests data, T059 is the specific task to add the `source_verified` flag to the results schema, which is required for the 'Verified Accuracy' principle in the Constitution.
